name: P-Image-Edit
description: Pruna's P-Image-Edit edits and composes 1-5 reference images with text instructions. It supports complex compositions, style transfers, and targeted edits with flexible output aspect ratios.

examples.name: Watercolor Style
examples.description: Apply a watercolor style transfer to a single reference image.

input.prompt: Transform the subject into a watercolor painting style with vibrant colors

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl

prompt.description: Text instruction describing the desired edit or composition.

images.description: Array of 1-5 reference images. Each entry is an HTTP(S) URL or a base64 data URI (data:image/...;base64,...).

turbo.description: Run faster with additional optimizations. For complicated tasks, it is recommended to turn this off.

disable_safety_checker.description: Disable safety checker for generated images.

image.description: Presigned URL for the edited image.
